notes: Ground-truth fixtures for ast-error-coverage observation tool. Files reference real source paths (no copies). Two tool misclassifications found: useWorkstreamsQuery and useKpiQuery are both HANDLED (isError destructured with rename) but the tool reports UNHANDLED because hasIsError checks for the literal property name 'isError' and misses renamed destructuring like 'isError: isWorkstreamsError'.

expected.notes: Destructures data/isLoading/isFetching/isFetched only. No isError. TODO(production-bug) comment confirms this is a known gap.
Destructures isError directly (no rename). Early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 65.
Passes onError callback in mutation options (line 46).
Destructures isError and refetch. Early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 92.
TOOL DISAGREES (reports UNHANDLED). Destructures 'isError: isWorkstreamsError' (renamed). Used in early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 171. Tool misses renamed isError destructuring.
Destructures only data/isLoading/isFetching. No error handling.
Destructures only data/isFetching/isFetched. No error handling.
Destructures only data/isFetching/isFetched. No error handling.
TOOL DISAGREES (reports UNHANDLED). Destructures 'isError: kpiIsError' (renamed). Used in early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 71. Tool misses renamed isError destructuring.
Destructures only data/isLoading/isFetching. No error handling.
Destructures only data/isLoading/isFetching. No error handling.
Destructures only data/isFetching. No error handling.
Destructures only mutateAsync. Error handling delegated to handleTeamSubmit utility (not visible to tool).
Destructures only mutateAsync. No local error handling.
Destructures only mutateAsync. No local error handling.
